mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_menu ORDER BY sort
SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.sort
SELECT m.* FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY m.sort
